name: Clipboard Data Collection Detected
description: Detects attempts to access or manipulate data stored in the user's clipboard, often indicating adversary collection efforts.

prompts.prompt: Suspicious clipboard data collection detected on host **{computer_name}**. The process **{image}** (command line: '`{command_line}`') attempted to access or manipulate clipboard data. This activity was initiated by **{user}** and the parent process was **{parent_image}**. This could indicate an adversary collecting sensitive information. Please investigate this event, focusing on the user's recent activities and the purpose of this process.

parameters.name: computer_name
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the clipboard access was detected.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The name of the process (e.g., powershell.exe, clip.exe) that interacted with the clipboard.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute the process.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user context under which the clipboard interaction occurred.

parameters.name: parent_image
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process that launched the process interacting with the clipboard.
